requirement_topic.en: Product Safety — EN 60335-2-40 Household Heat Pumps (GB)
requirement_topic.zh: 产品安全——EN 60335-2-40家用热泵（大不列颠）
requirement_topic.zht: 產品安全——EN 60335-2-40家用熱泵（大不列顛）

summary.en: Air-source heat pumps placed on the GB market for household and similar use must comply with the General Product Safety Regulations 2005 (SI 2005/1803) and sector-specific UK product safety legislation for electrical equipment, including The Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101). EN 60335-2-40 is a voluntary harmonised/designated technical standard that can give a presumption of conformity with the relevant safety requirements when applied correctly; it is not itself the mandatory legal obligation. EN 14511:2018 and EN 14825:2018 are performance and seasonal-efficiency test standards used as evidence where relevant. For A2L refrigerants such as R32, charge limits, ventilation, and leak-detection design must be assessed against the applicable legal safety requirements, with EN 60335-2-40 used as a recognised route where suitable.
summary.zh: 投放大不列颠市场的家用及类似用途空气源热泵须符合《2005年通用产品安全法规》（SI 2005/1803）以及适用于电气设备的具体英国产品安全法规，包括《2016年电气设备安全法规》（SI 2016/1101）。EN 60335-2-40是自愿采用的协调/指定技术标准，正确适用时可推定符合相关安全要求；其本身并非强制性法律义务。EN 14511:2018和EN 14825:2018是性能和季节性能效测试标准，可在相关情况下作为证据使用。对于R32等A2L制冷剂，充注量限制、通风和泄漏检测设计须依据适用法律安全要求评估，并在适合时以EN 60335-2-40作为被认可路径。
summary.zht: 投放大不列顛市場的家用及類似用途空氣源熱泵須符合《2005年通用產品安全法規》（SI 2005/1803）以及適用於電氣設備的具體英國產品安全法規，包括《2016年電氣設備安全法規》（SI 2016/1101）。EN 60335-2-40是自願採用的協調/指定技術標準，正確適用時可推定符合相關安全要求；其本身並非強制性法律義務。EN 14511:2018和EN 14825:2018是性能和季節性能效測試標準，可在相關情況下作為證據使用。對於R32等A2L制冷劑，充注量限制、通風和洩漏檢測設計須依據適用法律安全要求評估，並在適合時以EN 60335-2-40作為被認可路徑。

standards_or_laws: The General Product Safety Regulations 2005 (SI 2005/1803) — overarching GB product safety duty
The Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101) — low-voltage electrical safety for GB
EN 60335-2-40 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers (harmonised standard)
EN 14511:2018 — Performance testing at rated conditions

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for household heat pumps is GB 4706.32 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers), which is technically based on IEC 60335-2-40 with national deviations. Products must obtain CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for domestic market sale under the low-voltage electrical apparatus catalogue. CCC testing is conducted by CNCA-designated laboratories. While the GB 4706.32 standard shares a common IEC ancestor with EN 60335-2-40, national deviations, test conditions, and the certification pathway (third-party CCC vs. UK self-declaration with UKCA) are different. GB 4706.32 / CCC certification is not accepted as a substitute for EN 60335-2-40 testing under UK product safety regulations.
summary.zh: 中国针对家用热泵的主要安全标准为GB 4706.32（家用和类似用途电器安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求），该标准技术上基于IEC 60335-2-40，含有国家偏差。产品须在低压电器目录下取得CCC（中国强制认证）方可在中国国内市场销售。CCC测试由CNCA指定实验室进行。虽然GB 4706.32与EN 60335-2-40共享IEC共同祖源，但国家偏差、测试条件和认证路径（第三方CCC与英国UKCA自我声明）存在差异。依据英国产品安全法规，GB 4706.32 / CCC认证不被接受作为EN 60335-2-40测试的替代。
summary.zht: 中國針對家用熱泵的主要安全標準為GB 4706.32（家用和類似用途電器安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求），該標準技術上基於IEC 60335-2-40，含有國家偏差。產品須在低壓電器目錄下取得CCC（中國強制認證）方可在中國國內市場銷售。CCC測試由CNCA指定實驗室進行。雖然GB 4706.32與EN 60335-2-40共享IEC共同祖源，但國家偏差、測試條件和認證路徑（第三方CCC與英國UKCA自我聲明）存在差異。依據英國產品安全法規，GB 4706.32 / CCC認證不被接受作為EN 60335-2-40測試的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers (SAMR/SAC; technically based on IEC 60335-2-40 with national deviations)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — mandatory for domestic China market sale of heat pumps

gap.en: Exporters must demonstrate conformity with SI 2005/1803 and SI 2016/1101 and prepare the required declaration and technical file. EN 60335-2-40 testing is a voluntary harmonised/designated-standards route to presumption of conformity and is commonly used evidence, but alternative technical solutions may be possible if they demonstrate compliance with the legal essential safety requirements. Existing GB 4706.32 / CCC test reports do not automatically provide UK presumption of conformity. Product instructions must be in English.
gap.zh: 出口商须证明符合SI 2005/1803和SI 2016/1101，并准备所需符合性声明和技术文件。EN 60335-2-40测试是自愿的协调/指定标准路径，可带来符合性推定，也是常用证据；但如能证明符合合法的基本安全要求，也可采用其他技术方案。现有GB 4706.32 / CCC测试报告不会自动提供英国符合性推定。产品说明书须以英文提供。
gap.zht: 出口商須證明符合SI 2005/1803和SI 2016/1101，並準備所需符合性聲明和技術文件。EN 60335-2-40測試是自願的協調/指定標準路徑，可帶來符合性推定，也是常用證據；但如能證明符合合法的基本安全要求，也可採用其他技術方案。現有GB 4706.32 / CCC測試報告不會自動提供英國符合性推定。產品說明書須以英文提供。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation under SI 2005/1803 and SI 2016/1101; EN 60335-2-40 is voluntary harmonised/designated-standard evidence for presumption of conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product safety compliance under SI 2005/1803 and SI 2016/1101 is mandatory for heat pumps placed on the GB market. EN 60335-2-40 is not mandatory law; it is a voluntary harmonised/designated standard route that can confer presumption of conformity. Chinese GB 4706.32 / CCC certification does not by itself satisfy the UK conformity assessment pathway.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据SI 2005/1803和SI 2016/1101的产品安全合规，对投放大不列颠市场的热泵具有强制约束力。EN 60335-2-40并非强制性法律；它是自愿采用的协调/指定标准路径，可带来符合性推定。中国GB 4706.32 / CCC认证本身不满足英国合格评定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據SI 2005/1803和SI 2016/1101的產品安全合規，對投放大不列顛市場的熱泵具有強制約束力。EN 60335-2-40並非強制性法律；它是自願採用的協調/指定標準路徑，可帶來符合性推定。中國GB 4706.32 / CCC認證本身不滿足英國合格評定路徑。

source.publisher: legislation.gov.uk / King's Printer of Acts of Parliament
